vocab.meaning: cái nhìn lướt qua, nhanh chóng
vocab.example: I usually just give myself a cursory glance in the morning to ensure I don't look completely disheveled.

vocab.meaning: nghi thức/thói quen chăm sóc diện mạo
vocab.example: Looking in the mirror is an integral part of my morning grooming ritual before I head out to work.

vocab.meaning: xu hướng tự luyến/quá chú trọng vào bản thân
vocab.example: I try not to stare for too long to avoid developing any narcissistic tendencies.

vocab.meaning: sự chỉn chu, đoan trang (đủ để xuất hiện trước công chúng)
vocab.example: For me, the mirror is merely a tool to gauge my presentability before an important meeting.

vocab.meaning: hình ảnh phản chiếu thoáng qua
vocab.example: I often catch a fleeting reflection of myself in shop windows while walking down the street.

vocab.meaning: xem xét kỹ lưỡng diện mạo
vocab.example: I don't feel the need to constantly scrutinize my appearance unless it's for a special occasion.

vocab.meaning: thúc đẩy sự tự tin vào bản thân
vocab.example: Sometimes, a quick look in the mirror can boost my self-assurance before a public speaking engagement.

vocab.meaning: việc duy trì vẻ đẹp thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: Checking the mirror periodically is essential for basic aesthetic maintenance throughout a long day.
I am mindful of how I present myself, so I check the mirror a few times a day to fix my hair.
I view obsessive mirror-checking as a somewhat vain pursuit that wastes valuable time.
